scenes: Your worst decisions happen after 6pm. Here's why.
Every choice you make burns the same mental fuel. Big or tiny.
By evening, the tank is empty. That's decision fatigue.
It's why you doomscroll and order takeout. Not weakness. Depletion.
The fix: pre-decide. Same breakfast. Clothes picked at night. Workout scheduled.
Spend your choices where they matter.
Follow for one idea a day.
